title: orthochilus subulatus
intro: Orthochilus subulatus, also known as the needle-leaved orchid or the needle orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Orthochilus subulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
